symptoms: Drive-end vibration reached 7.8 mm/s; bearing housing temperature 92 C; grinding noise during loaded start
root_cause: Bearing wear from lubricant contamination and shaft misalignment
corrective_action: Replaced drive-end bearing, flushed grease cavity, corrected coupling alignment, and established new vibration baseline.

symptoms: Suction pressure dropped to 1.4 bar; pump vibration 6.9 mm/s; gravel-like cavitation noise
root_cause: Pump cavitation caused by blocked suction strainer and partially closed suction valve
corrective_action: Switched to standby pump, cleaned suction strainer, opened suction valve fully, and inspected impeller for pitting.

symptoms: Fan vibration rose to 8.2 mm/s; noise 97 dB; visible deposits on impeller blades
root_cause: Fan imbalance due to uneven dust buildup on blades
corrective_action: Stopped fan, cleaned impeller, checked blade pitch, torqued foundation bolts, and dynamically balanced rotor.

symptoms: Oil temperature 96 C; vibration 5.8 mm/s; ferrous particles detected in magnetic plug
root_cause: Gearbox wear accelerated by blocked oil filter and low lubrication flow
corrective_action: Replaced oil filters, flushed gearbox, inspected gear teeth by borescope, and refilled with approved EP oil.

symptoms: Outlet water temperature 94 C; cooling pressure 1.8 bar; tower fan current increased 18 percent
root_cause: Cooling failure from fouled heat exchanger and scaled tower fill media
corrective_action: Reduced thermal load, cleaned heat exchanger, replaced scaled fill sections, and recalibrated dosing pump.

symptoms: Belt mistracked to drive side; pulley bearing vibration 6.1 mm/s; motor current elevated
root_cause: Shaft misalignment and worn pulley lagging created belt slip and bearing load
corrective_action: Realigned drive pulley, replaced lagging, adjusted take-up tension, and inspected pulley bearings.

symptoms: Motor current 74 A; frame temperature 91 C; repeated overload warnings from VFD
root_cause: Motor overload caused by excessive conveyor belt tension and aggressive VFD ramp
corrective_action: Reduced belt tension, adjusted VFD acceleration profile, inspected terminals, and verified insulation resistance.

symptoms: Mechanical seal leaked heavily; pressure spikes above 10 bar; pump temperature 86 C
root_cause: Seal failure due to high pressure transients and abrasive contamination
corrective_action: Replaced mechanical seal, flushed casing, checked relief valve, and installed finer inline strainer.

symptoms: Gear mesh noise increased; oil analysis showed water contamination; temperature 88 C
root_cause: Lubrication failure from water ingress through damaged breather
corrective_action: Replaced breather, drained contaminated oil, flushed gearbox, and refilled with clean lubricant.

symptoms: Cooling fan noise 94 dB; vibration 5.4 mm/s; loose foundation bolts found
root_cause: Fan imbalance amplified by loose foundation bolts
corrective_action: Torqued foundation bolts, cleaned blades, performed dynamic balancing, and set monthly vibration checks.

symptoms: Tuyere cooling flow reduced; shell temperature spike; pressure drop across branch
root_cause: Cooling failure from partially blocked tuyere cooling branch
corrective_action: Reduced blast, isolated branch, flushed cooling line, leak-tested tuyere, and restored flow.

symptoms: Mill stand drive vibration 6.4 mm/s; current above normal; coupling temperature elevated
root_cause: Shaft misalignment after roll changeover
corrective_action: Stopped mill, performed laser alignment, inspected coupling insert, and restarted under reduced load.

symptoms: Crusher motor current 78 A; bearing temperature 93 C; vibration 7.1 mm/s under load
root_cause: Motor overload caused by jammed crusher feed and bearing wear
corrective_action: Cleared jam, replaced damaged bearing, checked motor terminals, and added feed-rate alarm.

symptoms: Exhaust fan vibration 5.9 mm/s; noise 91 dB; dust cake buildup visible
root_cause: Fan imbalance caused by uneven dust accumulation on impeller
corrective_action: Cleaned fan impeller, inspected bag filters, balanced rotor, and increased cleaning pulse frequency.

symptoms: Coolant pressure 1.2 bar; outlet temperature 96 C; pump suction noise
root_cause: Cooling failure driven by pump cavitation and blocked suction strainer
corrective_action: Switched to backup pump, cleaned strainer, flushed line, and verified temperature recovery.

symptoms: Insulation resistance dropped; frame temperature 89 C; current imbalance between phases
root_cause: Motor overload and cooling passage blockage by dust
corrective_action: Cleaned cooling passages, tightened terminals, tested insulation, and reduced load until temperature normalized.

symptoms: Take-up travel reached limit; belt slipped; drive current and pulley vibration increased
root_cause: Conveyor belt tension loss and pulley bearing wear
corrective_action: Adjusted take-up, inspected belt splice, replaced pulley bearing, and verified belt tracking.

symptoms: Hydraulic fluid temperature 91 C; pressure ripple; pump current high
root_cause: Lubrication failure from contaminated hydraulic fluid and blocked return filter
corrective_action: Replaced return filter, sampled and replaced fluid, bled air, and checked relief valve setting.

symptoms: Gearbox vibration 7.4 mm/s; oil temperature 99 C; audible knocking from stage 2
root_cause: Gearbox wear from stage-2 bearing spalling
corrective_action: Replaced stage-2 bearing, inspected gear teeth, flushed oil circuit, and shortened inspection interval.

symptoms: Fan vibration 6.7 mm/s after speed change; noise 93 dB; one blade pitch setting off by 4 degrees
root_cause: Fan imbalance from incorrect blade pitch setting
corrective_action: Reset blade pitch, balanced fan, verified motor current, and logged new operating baseline.
